name: createTimeTravelController
description: Time travel controller for deterministic testing of time-based operations. More powerful than createControlledTimer - allows jumping to specific times, inspecting the timeline, and running all pending

name: TimeController
description: A controller for manipulating time in tests. Use this to fast-forward through delays and timeouts without waiting.

name: PendingTimeout
description: Internal representation of a pending timeout.

name: createTimeController
description: Creates a time controller for testing. Provides fine-grained control over time without actually waiting.

name: createTestScope
description: Test helper that creates a scope with time control enabled. Automatically installs the time controller and returns both the scope and controller.

name: StreamConversionOptions
description: Options for stream conversion

name: channelToReadableStream
description: Convert a go-go-scope Channel to a ReadableStream

name: readableStreamToChannel
description: Convert a ReadableStream to a go-go-scope Channel

name: channelToWritableStream
description: Convert a go-go-scope Channel to a WritableStream

name: writableStreamToChannel
description: Convert a WritableStream to a go-go-scope Channel

name: TransformConfig
description: Create a TransformStream from a channel transformation

name: streamToReadableStream
description: Convert a go-go-scope Stream (from @go-go-scope/stream) to a ReadableStream

name: readableStreamToStream
description: Convert a ReadableStream to a go-go-scope Stream-compatible async iterable

name: DuplexStream
description: Create a duplex stream (ReadableStream + WritableStream) from two channels

name: teeStream
description: Tee a ReadableStream into two channels

name: pipeStreams
description: Create a backpressure-aware stream pipe

name: iterableToReadableStream
description: Create a stream from an async iterable with proper backpressure

name: streamToArray
description: Collect a ReadableStream into an array

name: streamFirst
description: Read the first value from a ReadableStream

name: mapStream
description: Apply a function to each chunk of a stream

name: filterStream
description: Filter chunks in a stream

name: bufferStream
description: Buffer stream chunks into arrays

name: debounceStream
description: Debounce a stream

name: throttleStream
description: Throttle a stream

name: takeStream
description: Take only the first n chunks from a stream

name: skipStream
description: Skip the first n chunks from a stream

name: isReadableStream
description: Type guard to check if value is a ReadableStream

name: isWritableStream
description: Type guard to check if value is a WritableStream

name: isTransformStream
description: Type guard to check if value is a TransformStream
